hero_description: Summarizes emails, schedules meetings, writes content, analyzes data, catches failures and brings order to the chaos. Connected to all your tools. Up in 3 minutes.
hero_cta: Give me an agent that works for me
demo_title: Here's what you see every morning at 7 AM
demo_subtitle: Your agent already scanned your emails, checked your calendar, flagged the slips. Everything ready in WhatsApp before you're awake.
demo_msg_1_html: Good morning! Here's your summary for today:
demo_msg_2: 3 new emails need a reply. One is from a client you haven't gotten back to in two days.
demo_msg_3: Your calendar today: 10:00 call with Noam, 14:00 team meeting. I prepared a summary from the previous meeting.
demo_msg_4: I noticed a supplier invoice sitting untouched for 5 days. Want me to remind you this afternoon?
demo_footer: Nothing happens without your approval. You're in full control.
features_title: Not just an assistant. A real employee.
features_subtitle: Here's what your agent does every day, without you asking
features_emails_desc: Reads every email, filters spam, catches the ones that slipped through the cracks.
features_sales_desc: Centralizes data from email, CRM and sheets. Spots trends and surfaces performance.
features_meetings_desc: Proposes times, coordinates with people, surfaces each meeting with full context.
features_content_desc: Draft emails, posts, quotes, meeting recaps. You just edit.
features_detect_desc: Client you forgot to reply to? Task past its deadline? Invoice never sent?
features_tasks_desc: Breaks projects into tasks, tracks deadlines, reminds you automatically.
personas_title: For anyone who needs a personal assistant
personas_subtitle: Whatever your role. If you have emails, a calendar and tasks — there's an agent for you.
step_1_desc: Within 3 minutes your agent sends you its first message on WhatsApp.
step_2_title: Connect your tools in one click
step_2_desc: Gmail, Calendar, CRM, Slack — one click to connect.
step_3_desc: The agent starts scanning, learning, and sending you updates.
pricing_note: Everything included. No surprises. Cancel anytime.
final_cta_title: Tomorrow morning you have a new employee
final_cta_desc: It doesn't sleep, doesn't forget, doesn't miss. Connected to every tool you use.
final_cta_btn: I want to be one of the first 100
meta_home_description: Agentiko - your smart WhatsApp assistant. A personal AI agent that manages emails, calendar, tasks and more.
legal_en_disclaimer: This English version is provided for convenience only. The Hebrew version is the legally binding document. In case of any discrepancy, the Hebrew version shall prevail.
